title: Notification regarding Manner and Intervals of Time for conduct of Energy Audit In exercise of the powers conferred by clauses (i) and (k) of Section 14 of the Energy Conservation Act, 2001 (52 of 2001).

[F. No. 10/1/2013-EC] SATISH KUMAR, Jt. Secy.
